endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/queryPacks/{queryPackName}/queries
endpoints.description: Gets a list of Queries defined within a Log Analytics QueryPack.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{QUERYPACKNAME}} with a real querypackname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/queryPacks/{queryPackName}/queries/search
endpoints.description: Search a list of Queries defined within a Log Analytics QueryPack according to given search properties.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{QUERYPACKNAME}} with a real querypackname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/queryPacks/{queryPackName}/queries/{queryId}
endpoints.description: Gets a specific Log Analytics Query defined within a Log Analytics QueryPack.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{QUERYID}} with a real queryid. Replace {{QUERYPACKNAME}} with a real querypackname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/queryPacks/{queryPackName}/queries/{queryId}
endpoints.description: Adds or Updates a specific Query within a Log Analytics QueryPack.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{QUERYID}} with a real queryid. Replace {{QUERYPACKNAME}} with a real querypackname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/queryPacks/{queryPackName}/queries/{queryId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a specific Query defined within an Log Analytics QueryPack.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{QUERYID}} with a real queryid. Replace {{QUERYPACKNAME}} with a real querypackname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
